input_natural_language: Exceeding sensor limits shall latch an autopilot pullup when the pilot is not in control (not standby) and the system is supported without failures (not apfail).
explanation: The LTL formula captures the requirement that whenever the sensors exceed their limits, it should eventually lead to the autopilot entering the pullup state, but only when the pilot is not in control (standby is false) and the system is supported without failures (apfail is false). This is expressed by substituting the corresponding boolean expressions into the structured natural language elements and ensures the logical progression based on the stated conditions.
decision1_substring: when the pilot is not in control (not standby) and the system is supported without failures (not apfail)
output_structured_natural_language: only while !standby & !apfail & supported, whenever limits, eventually satisfy pullup
